feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Tracking Capacity Unit Usage for SAC and SAP Databricks
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

I’m currently looking into Capacity Unit consumption across different services. 
While this is easy to track in SAP Datasphere, I’m wondering where Capacity Unit usage can be monitored for SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and SAP Databricks when everything is part of the same SAP Business Data Cloud setup.

 

Is there a central place for this, or does each service have its own usage reporting?

 

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Average on left side of a story table with dynamic range
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to create an average column with dynamic range? The idea is that the user can select a dynamic time range:

The ideal scenario would be that my formula is pointing from column E to the latest column always.

Is this achievable in web stories?

Thanks

entry.title: SAC Variable screen sort on value help
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAC on top of BW/4HANA Live Model. There's one Period (Year-Month) selection in the variable screen. When we open the value help, we see the months sorted in ascending order. Can we somehow reverse the order so that the latest period comes on top?

 

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: sac planning model data export from export jobs
entry.content:
Hi All,
Can anyone of you please help me how to export the forecast version data from planning model to backend DB. 
After publishing the data from Story, it will come to Model. 
From model how to export that forecast version data into backend DB.

Please help me how to do this with Oracle DB and SAP Datasphere.

entry.title: Is there a good way to automatically export a printed SAC story with different input control filter?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a story that includes three different input control filters. I need to select various values in these filters and export the story as a PDF. However, the three filters result in a total of 90 combinations, which makes manual exporting impractical. I’m wondering whether there is any good way to automatically export a printed SAC story using different input control filter values.

I’ve considered using Publications with bookmarks, but 90 combinations would require creating 90 separate publications, and I don’t have enough licenses for that. I also looked into batch export, but it appears to support only a single story filter, so it doesn’t fit my use case.

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Custom CDS Views / Analytical Queries Not Visible in SAC Live Connection via SAP_COM_0065
entry.content:
I successfully set up a Live Data Connection between SAC and S/4HANA Public Cloud using OAuth authentication via communication scenario SAP_COM_0065. The connection is validated and working — when browsing sources in SAC, I can see approximately 100 standard SAP queries (e.g. 2CCENGPTEBILLITMQ and similar standard delivered queries).

However, my custom developments are completely invisible in SAC. Specifically:

  • Custom CDS views of type Analytical Cube that I created in the Custom CDS Views app do not appear as available sources in SAC.
  • Custom Analytical Queries that I created on top of both my custom cubes and SAP-delivered released cubes (published with green status) are also not showing up in SAC.
  • Only SAP standard delivered queries that are pre-registered to SAP_COM_0065 are visible.

entry.title: Recommendations for Advanced JavaScript Training for SAC Developers
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Our company is exploring developer-focused technical training for our SAC team.

We are specifically looking for engineering-level JavaScript training that goes beyond standard SAC Story scripting.

The goal is to build strong engineering capabilities for SAC development, not functional story design.

If anyone knows training providers or programs that offer this type of training, I would appreciate your recommendations.

Thank you!

entry.title: ISTOCKQUANVALTS cds view does not work when used in an eclipse calc. view
entry.content:
Hello

we want to create a Stock Report per month in SAC and we want to utilize ISTOCKQUANVALTS cds view. The view shows correct data when checking it through SAP gui. We create in eclipse a calc. view with this cds in the projection and we map all the required parameters. The issue is that we cannot see any data with the custom calc. view. Does anyone have similar experience?

thanks!

entry.title: Recommendations for Advanced JavaScript Training for SAC Developers
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Our company is exploring developer-focused technical training for our SAC team.

We are specifically looking for engineering-level JavaScript training that goes beyond standard SAC Story scripting.

The goal is to build strong engineering capabilities for SAC development, not functional story design.

If anyone knows training providers or programs that offer this type of training, I would appreciate your recommendations.

Thank you!

entry.title: How can i export data through the model data management which located in Workspace?
entry.content:
Hello, expert!

There's a way to export model data through the data management which located in workspace?

or Can i export data only in public folder(in data management)?

 

Regards, HJ.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Connection To Sharepoint via Open Connectors
entry.content:
Hi,

I am wondering if anybody else has used the functionality to take flat file data from Sharepoint via Open Connectors into SAC?

We have recently, and are still experiencing a problem, in that we had a secret that was going to expire for the OAuth so I attempted to update it in the connection.

While the connection refused to save, it has now rendered the connection useless. I think this is to do with the fact that users are now being told to use Microsoft Graph, however I have turned this on in the Open connector instance but to no avail.

The Sharepoint instance in Open Connectors works fine, however it will only use the redirect from an Entra app of https://auth.cloudelements.io/oauth.

I am sure it used to work with https://bocauth.us1.sapbusinessobjects.cloud:443 but this could be to do with the Graph changes - not sure.

If I try to create a connection in SAC to Sharepoint I get no prompt for the Trust button and the connection just says there was a problem getting the authorization code.

Has anybody got experience of setting up SAC to talk to Sharepoint via Open Connectors? I am not even sure if how we are trying to do it is the correct way. There are docs on it, however they all either miss out key areas or refer to the old way of trusting the Entra app with a button which I think is being deprecated. I just need an example of a working solution and hopefully the penny will drop.

Also - is the appID and secret used in the SAC connection the same details as was used in the Open Connectors Instance? It doesn't feel right that the same details need to be applied in two different places, however this used to work but its raised questions on how our current setup is.

Any help much appreciated.

entry.title: Calculating Manager input in the comment section for CDP
entry.content:
We are working on a People Analytics Story Report for CY 2026 CDP and need assistance with calculating the “Manager Input” metric.

Business Definition

Manager Input (overall) = 1 if the manager has left a comment in at least one section of the CDP; otherwise 0.

The final KPI should represent the % of manager input in CDP,

Current Setup

  • I have created section‑level manager comment flags (0/1) per section, for example: Manager_Comment_My Current Role Manager_Comment_Area of Strength etc.
  • Each flag correctly shows 1 when a manager comment exists for that section and 0 otherwise.
  • I then created an overall manager input flag using logic such as: IF(ISNULL([M_C]), 0, [M_C]) + IF(ISNULL([M_C_1]), 0, [M_C_1]) + IF(ISNULL([M_C_2]), 0, [M_C_2]) + IF(ISNULL([M_C_3]), 0, [M_C_3])

Issue

When I attempt to calculate the total number of comment with manager input, I get unexpected results: In some cases, the total inflates significantly (e.g., 168 instead of 4), which appears to be caused by row duplication from section/comment‑level data.

All calculation I added on query level, in calculated comment

Does anyone have any suggestion how to fix it?

entry.title: Dynamic Display of Dimension Properties in Table using Checkbox (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
 
I have a requirement in SAP Analytics Cloud and would appreciate your guidance.
 
I have a table with the following dimensions:
• Profit Center (general dimension)
• GL Account (Account Dimension)
• Partner Unit (general dimension)
 
The Profit Center dimension has around 25 properties (for example: Brand, Location, etc.).
 
Requirement:
 
I want to provide users with a checkbox (or multi-selection option) where:
• If the user selects certain properties (e.g., Brand, Location), those properties should be displayed in the table.
• If the user unchecks them, the properties should be removed from the table dynamically.
 
Question:
 
How can this be achieved using JavaScript in SAC (Analytics Designer)?
Is there a way to dynamically add/remove dimension properties as columns based on user selection?
 
Any suggestions or sample approaches would be really helpful.
 
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Story Report Usability Metrics
entry.content:
I am looking to see if anyone in the SAPSF Reporting Analytics world has a working Story Report that they use to provide usability or usage metrics for all their active reports (e.g., who used the report, how often, adoption metrics)?

If not, I’m also open to hearing what you are using instead or whether usage metrics is limited to Story Performance Analysis tool only.

Any insight or ideas would be greatly appreciated!!

Melanie

entry.title: Not able to see Calender option when i am selecting Dyanmic filter range in SAC.
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am facing an issue in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). My requirement is to load the dashboard by default for the current date and also provide a date calendar so that users can select any date as needed.

However, when I create an input control and select the Dynamic option, I do not see the calendar picer. Instead, I only see options such as lookback and lookforward. When I select the Fixed option, the calendar appears, but in that case the dashboard does not load by default for the current date.

Could someone please guide me on how to achieve both:
• Default dashboard load for the current date
• Allow users to select any date using the calendar

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: SCIM3 PATCH API returning 403 Forbidden in SAP Analytics Cloud (GET works, Admin access available)
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I am facing an issue while using the SCIM3 API in SAP Analytics Cloud to update team members using PATCH operation.

API Details

Endpoint:

PATCH  /api/v1/scim3/Groups/<TEAM_UUID>

Authentication:
  • Authorization Bearer Token
Headers Used

  • Authorization: Bearer <access_token>

  • x-csrf-token: <csrf_token>

  • x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true

Payload
"schemas": [
            "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
        ],
        "Operations": [
            {
                "op":"add",
                "path":"members",
                "value":[
                    {
                        "value":"d0bbac78-776890-9876hjmd",
                        "type":"User",
                        "display":"newuser",
                        "$ref":"/api/v1/scim3/Users/d0bbac78-776890-9876hjmd"
                    }
                ]
            },
            {
                "op": "replace",
            "path": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group:description",
            "value": "patch test"
            }
        ]
Issue

The PATCH request consistently returns:

{
"status": 403,
"error":"Forbidden"
}

Observations

  • GET operations on /api/v1/scim3/Groups are working successfully.
  • Team UUID is retrieved correctly.
  • Team type is userGroup.
  • I have full admin access (BI_Admin role) in SAP Analytics Cloud.
  • OAuth Client is configured with API access with App Integration.
  • CSRF Token is fetched and passed correctly.
  • when CSRF token is removed, the API returns 401 Unauthorized.
  • PATCH always returns 403 Forbidden.
Questions
  1. Are there additional permissions required specifically for SCIM3 PATCH operations ?
  2. Does the OAuth client require explicit SCIM provisioning(write) permissions?
  3. Are there any tenant-level restrictions for SCIM3 write operations ?
Attachments
  • PATCH request (headers + payload)

 

  • Response (403 Forbidden)

Any guidance would be helpful

Thanks!

entry.title: the Date Hierarchy SAC , in some story the filter can only be sorted with default direction
entry.content:
the Date Hierarchy does not work well in SAC , in some story the filter can only be sorted with default direction , in other story the visuals only works with flat presentation.

see in screenshots. the same filter, change from default to lastest first. the filter does not show any values anymore .

entry.title: Missing CSS Class field for components in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Has the CSS Class field been removed?

I am trying to apply box shadows under my panels with the SPA_SAMPLE_CONTENT_Theme.

 

If I copy the panel from another Page, the Class is clearly copied along with it, but there is no field where it can be edited.

 

 

I found a video from just a month ago that has the field for the Class name:

entry.title: User not able to share bookmarks in sac stories
entry.content: Users are unable to find other users in the user list when attempting to share a personal bookmark with other SAC users who have same role. The data model resides in Datasphere, where the user has a "consume" role. Furthermore, in SAC, the user has a "standard viewer" role and view/share access to the relevant story.

entry.title: SAPP SAC model YWD (Year-Week-Day) hierarchy is not selectable
entry.content:
In an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) model, the YWD (Year-Week-Day) hierarchy is not selectable when using a live HANA connection. I select the clock (Create date dimension) in the model and want to create the date dimension. However, the YWD option is not available here.  What can I do?

However, this hierarchy option is displayed in another model, and they are identical.
